title: Medicare levy
description: Find out about the Medicare levy and if you are eligible for an exemption or reduction.
keywords: Medicare, medicare levy, medicare levy exemption, medicare exemption, medicare levy surcharge, medicare surcharge

child_links.title: What is the Medicare levy?
child_links.description: The Medicare levy is an amount you pay in addition to the tax you pay on your taxable income.

child_links.title: Medicare levy exemption
child_links.description: Find out about Medicare levy exemptions for medical conditions, foreign residents or entitlement to Medicare benefits.

child_links.title: Medicare levy reduction
child_links.description: Find out if you are eligible for a Medicare levy reduction based on your income or family income.
